joyful.traditional_days: Mondays, Saturdays, and Sundays of Advent/Christmas season

scripture.text: In the sixth month, the angel Gabriel was sent from God to a town of Galilee called Nazareth, to a virgin betrothed to a man named Joseph, of the house of David, and the virgin's name was Mary.

quotes.author: St. Bernard of Clairvaux
quotes.text: The angel awaits your reply… O Lady, answer quickly.

quotes.author: St. Augustine
quotes.text: Mary conceived Christ in her heart before she conceived Him in her womb.

quotes.author: Pope St. John Paul II
quotes.text: Mary's fiat is the model of every Christian vocation.

quotes.author: St. Irenaeus
quotes.text: The knot of Eve's disobedience was loosed by Mary's obedience.

quotes.author: St. Louis de Montfort
quotes.text: God gathered all waters and called them the sea; He gathered all His graces and called them Mary.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: The eternal Son of God bowed the heavens and came down through Mary's consent.

quotes.author: Pope Pius X
quotes.text: Mary's obedience repaired the ruin brought by Eve.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: In the Annunciation begins the restoration of all things in Christ.

paintings.title: Annunciation with St. Margaret and St. Ansanus

scripture.text: During those days Mary set out and traveled to the hill country in haste to a town of Judah, where she entered the house of Zechariah and greeted Elizabeth. When Elizabeth heard Mary's greeting, the infant leaped in her womb, and Elizabeth, filled with the holy Spirit, cried out in a loud voice and said, 'Most blessed are you among women, and blessed is the fruit of your womb.'

quotes.author: St. Ambrose
quotes.text: Mary arose and went with haste—charity knows no delay.

quotes.author: Pope Francis
quotes.text: Mary is the woman who goes out, who doesn't remain closed in.

quotes.author: St. Teresa of Calcutta
quotes.text: Let us bring Christ to others as Mary did.

quotes.author: St. Bede the Venerable
quotes.text: At Mary's greeting, grace is poured out.

quotes.author: Pope St. John Paul II
quotes.text: The Visitation reveals the missionary dimension of faith.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: Mary hastens to Elizabeth bearing Christ, the source of grace.

quotes.author: Pope Benedict XV
quotes.text: Charity shines forth in Mary's visit.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XI
quotes.text: Mary's journey is a model of apostolic zeal.

scripture.text: In those days a decree went out from Caesar Augustus that the whole world should be enrolled. This was the first enrollment, when Quirinius was governor of Syria. So all went to be enrolled, each to his own town. And Joseph too went up from Galilee from the town of Nazareth to Judea, to the city of David that is called Bethlehem, because he was of the house and family of David, to be enrolled with Mary, his betrothed, who was with child. While they were there, the time came for her to have her child, and she gave birth to her firstborn son. She wrapped him in swaddling clothes and laid him in a manger, because there was no room for them in the inn.

quotes.author: St. Leo the Great
quotes.text: Christian, remember your dignity.

quotes.author: St. Francis of Assisi
quotes.text: We see Him as a poor child lying in a manger.

quotes.author: Pope Benedict XVI
quotes.text: God made Himself small so we could understand Him.

quotes.author: St. Alphonsus Liguori
quotes.text: Love made Him a child.

quotes.author: St. Gregory Nazianzen
quotes.text: He is wrapped in swaddling clothes, but He loosens the bands of sin.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: Christ is born for the salvation of all.

quotes.author: Pope Pius X
quotes.text: The Child of Bethlehem is our Redeemer.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: In the crib we contemplate divine love made visible.

paintings.title: Nativity with St. Francis and St. Lawrence (1600)

scripture.text: When eight days were completed for his circumcision, he was named Jesus, the name given him by the angel before he was conceived in the womb. When the days were completed for their purification according to the law of Moses, they took him up to Jerusalem to present him to the Lord, just as it is written in the law of the Lord, 'Every male that opens the womb shall be consecrated to the Lord,' and to offer the sacrifice of 'a pair of turtledoves or two young pigeons,' in accordance with the dictate in the law of the Lord.

quotes.author: St. Sophronius
quotes.text: Receive the Light which enlightens every man.

quotes.author: Pope St. John Paul II
quotes.text: Simeon recognizes in Jesus the Savior of all.

quotes.author: St. Cyril of Jerusalem
quotes.text: Christ is presented as the firstborn of a new creation.

quotes.author: St. Bonaventure
quotes.text: Mary offers her Son with perfect obedience.

quotes.author: St. John Henry Newman
quotes.text: To live is to change, and to be perfect is to have changed often.

quotes.author: Pope Pius X
quotes.text: Christ is offered as the victim for our salvation.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: Mary unites herself to the sacrifice of her Son.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: The Presentation foretells the redeeming sacrifice.

paintings.title: Presentation of Jesus at the Temple
Presentation of Jesus at the Temple (San Marco Cell 10)
Presentation of Jesus at the Temple

scripture.text: Each year his parents went to Jerusalem for the feast of Passover, and when he was twelve years old, they went up according to festival custom. After they had completed its days, as they were returning, the boy Jesus remained behind in Jerusalem, but his parents did not know it. Thinking that he was in the caravan, they journeyed for a day and looked for him among their relatives and acquaintances, but not finding him, they returned to Jerusalem to look for him. After three days they found him in the temple, sitting in the midst of the teachers, listening to them and asking them questions, and all who heard him were astounded at his understanding and his answers.

quotes.author: St. Augustine
quotes.text: He was lost to be found.

quotes.author: Origen
quotes.text: Seek Jesus, and you will find Him in the temple.

quotes.author: Pope Benedict XVI
quotes.text: Jesus' true home is the Father.

quotes.author: St. Teresa of Ávila
quotes.text: Seek yourself in Me.

quotes.author: St. Ambrose
quotes.text: Let us seek Christ diligently.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XI
quotes.text: Christ teaches divine wisdom even in youth.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: Those who seek Christ shall find Him.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: Jesus reveals His mission from the Father.

paintings.title: The Finding of the Saviour in the Temple
The Finding of the Child Jesus in the Temple

mysteries.name: The Baptism of Christ in the Jordan

scripture.text: After Jesus was baptized, he came up from the water and behold, the heavens were opened for him, and he saw the Spirit of God descending like a dove and coming upon him. And a voice came from the heavens, saying, 'This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased.'

quotes.author: St. Gregory Nazianzen
quotes.text: Christ is baptized, let us descend with Him.

quotes.author: Pope Francis
quotes.text: In baptism we become children of God.

quotes.author: St. Maximus of Turin
quotes.text: The waters are sanctified by Christ.

quotes.author: St. John Chrysostom
quotes.text: He needed no cleansing, yet He cleanses all.

quotes.author: Pope Benedict XVI
quotes.text: Jesus' baptism is His acceptance of His mission.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: Christ sanctified the waters for our rebirth.

quotes.author: Pope Pius X
quotes.text: Baptism makes us children of God.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: In Christ's baptism is prefigured our own.

paintings.artist: Andrea del Verrocchio & Leonardo da Vinci
paintings.title: The Baptism of Christ
Triptych of Jan Des Trompes (Baptism of Christ)

scripture.text: On the third day there was a wedding in Cana in Galilee, and the mother of Jesus was there. Jesus and his disciples were also invited to the wedding. When the wine ran short, the mother of Jesus said to him, 'They have no wine.' And Jesus said to her, 'Woman, how does your concern affect me? My hour has not yet come.' His mother said to the servers, 'Do whatever he tells you.'

quotes.author: St. Bernard of Clairvaux
quotes.text: Mary speaks, and Jesus acts.

quotes.author: Pope St. John Paul II
quotes.text: Do whatever He tells you.

quotes.author: St. Thomas Aquinas
quotes.text: Grace perfects nature.

quotes.author: St. Alphonsus Liguori
quotes.text: Mary is the dispenser of divine graces.

quotes.author: Pope Benedict XVI
quotes.text: Cana points toward the Eucharist.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: Mary's intercession obtains divine grace.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XI
quotes.text: The miracle reveals Christ's divine power.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: Cana shows the role of Mary in salvation.

mysteries.name: The Proclamation of the Kingdom of God

scripture.text: This is the time of fulfillment. The kingdom of God is at hand. Repent, and believe in the gospel.

quotes.author: Jesus Christ (Mark 1:15)
quotes.text: Repent, and believe in the Gospel.

quotes.author: Pope Francis
quotes.text: The Kingdom of God is among you.

quotes.author: Pope St. John Paul II
quotes.text: Do not be afraid.

quotes.author: St. Augustine
quotes.text: Our hearts are restless until they rest in You.

quotes.author: St. Catherine of Siena
quotes.text: Be who God meant you to be.

quotes.author: Pope Pius X
quotes.text: To restore all things in Christ is the mission of the Church.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: Christ calls all men to the Kingdom of God.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XI
quotes.text: The reign of Christ must be established in souls.

paintings.title: The Sermon on the Sea of Galilee
Miracle of the Loaves and Fishes

scripture.text: After six days Jesus took Peter, James, and John his brother, and led them up a high mountain by themselves. And he was transfigured before them; his face shone like the sun and his clothes became white as light.

quotes.author: St. Leo the Great
quotes.text: The glory of the head shines in the body.

quotes.author: Pope Benedict XVI
quotes.text: The Transfiguration reveals Christ's divinity.

quotes.author: St. John Damascene
quotes.text: He shows what we shall become.

quotes.author: St. Gregory Palamas
quotes.text: The light is uncreated.

quotes.author: Pope Francis
quotes.text: Let us contemplate the face of Christ.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: Christ manifests His glory to strengthen faith.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: The vision of glory prepares for the Passion.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XI
quotes.text: Faith is confirmed by divine revelation.

scripture.text: While they were eating, Jesus took bread, said the blessing, broke it, and giving it to his disciples said, 'Take and eat; this is my body.'

quotes.author: St. Thomas Aquinas
quotes.text: O sacred banquet!

quotes.author: Pope St. John Paul II
quotes.text: The Church draws her life from the Eucharist.

quotes.author: St. Padre Pio
quotes.text: It would be easier for the world to survive without the sun than without the Mass.

quotes.author: St. Ignatius of Antioch
quotes.text: The Eucharist is the medicine of immortality.

quotes.author: Pope Benedict XVI
quotes.text: The Eucharist is Jesus Himself.

quotes.author: Pope Pius X
quotes.text: Holy Communion is the shortest and safest way to heaven.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: The Eucharist is the source of Christian life.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: The Eucharistic sacrifice perpetuates the Cross.

sorrowful.traditional_days: Tuesdays, Fridays, and Sundays of Lent

scripture.text: Then Jesus came with them to a place called Gethsemane, and he said to his disciples, 'Sit here while I go over there and pray.' He took along Peter and the two sons of Zebedee, and began to feel sorrow and distress. Then he said to them, 'My soul is sorrowful even to death. Remain here and keep watch with me.' He advanced a little and fell prostrate in prayer, saying, 'My Father, if it is possible, let this cup pass from me; yet, not as I will, but as you will.'

quotes.author: St. Alphonsus Liguori
quotes.text: Prayer is the great means of salvation.

quotes.author: Pope Benedict XVI
quotes.text: Jesus' 'yes' reverses Adam's 'no.'

quotes.author: St. Teresa of Ávila
quotes.text: Prayer is friendship with God.

quotes.author: Pope St. John Paul II
quotes.text: Watch and pray.

quotes.author: St. Faustina Kowalska
quotes.text: In suffering is hidden strength.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: Christ accepts the chalice of suffering for our salvation.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: Prayer strengthens the soul in trial.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XI
quotes.text: In Gethsemane we see the obedience of Christ.

scripture.text: Then he released Barabbas to them, but after he had Jesus scourged, he handed him over to be crucified.

quotes.author: St. Bridget of Sweden
quotes.text: His wounds are our healing.

quotes.author: St. Peter (1 Peter 2:24)
quotes.text: By His wounds you have been healed.

quotes.author: St. John Chrysostom
quotes.text: He endured all for love.

quotes.author: Pope Francis
quotes.text: Jesus' suffering is love in action.

quotes.author: St. Catherine of Siena
quotes.text: The blood of Christ is our hope.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XI
quotes.text: Christ suffers to atone for sin.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: The Passion reveals the price of our redemption.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: His wounds are the signs of divine love.

scripture.text: Then the soldiers of the governor took Jesus inside the praetorium and gathered the whole cohort around him. They stripped off his clothes and threw a scarlet military cloak about him. Weaving a crown out of thorns, they placed it on his head, and a reed in his right hand. And kneeling before him, they mocked him, saying, 'Hail, King of the Jews!'

quotes.author: St. Bernard of Clairvaux
quotes.text: The thorns signify our sins.

quotes.author: St. Augustine
quotes.text: He wore a crown of pain.

quotes.author: Pope Benedict XVI
quotes.text: True kingship is service.

quotes.author: St. Alphonsus Liguori
quotes.text: Love made Him suffer.

quotes.author: St. Teresa of Calcutta
quotes.text: Love until it hurts.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: Christ reigns by suffering.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: The mockery of men cannot obscure His kingship.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XI
quotes.text: Christ is King even in humiliation.

paintings.title: Head of Christ Crowned with Thorns

scripture.text: They pressed into service a passer-by, Simon, a Cyrenian, who was coming in from the country, the father of Alexander and Rufus, to carry his cross. They brought him to the place of Golgotha (which is translated Place of the Skull).

quotes.author: Jesus Christ (Matthew 16:24)
quotes.text: Take up your cross.

quotes.author: St. Rose of Lima
quotes.text: Apart from the cross there is no other ladder.

quotes.author: Pope St. John Paul II
quotes.text: The cross is the tree of life.

quotes.author: St. Louis de Montfort
quotes.text: The cross is the greatest mystery.

quotes.author: St. Padre Pio
quotes.text: Do not fear suffering.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: The Cross is the instrument of salvation.

quotes.author: Pope Pius X
quotes.text: We must follow Christ in bearing the Cross.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: The way of the Cross leads to life.

paintings.title: Christ Falling on the Way to Calvary (Lo Spasimo)

scripture.text: When they came to the place called the Skull, they crucified him and the criminals there, one on his right, the other on his left. Then Jesus said, 'Father, forgive them, they know not what they do.' It was now about noon and darkness came over the whole land until three in the afternoon because of an eclipse of the sun. Then the veil of the temple was torn down the middle. Jesus cried out in a loud voice, 'Father, into your hands I commend my spirit'; and when he had said this he breathed his last.

quotes.author: St. Augustine
quotes.text: God loved us even to death.

quotes.author: Pope Francis
quotes.text: The cross is God's mercy.

quotes.author: St. Leo the Great
quotes.text: The death of Christ is life.

quotes.author: Pope St. John Paul II
quotes.text: We are the Easter people.

quotes.author: St. Teresa of Calcutta
quotes.text: Jesus loved you to the end.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: On the Cross Christ consummates redemption.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: The Cross is the throne of grace.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XI
quotes.text: Christ's death is the victory over sin.

glorious.traditional_days: Wednesdays and Sundays outside Advent and Lent

scripture.text: But at daybreak on the first day of the week they took the spices they had prepared and went to the tomb. They found the stone rolled away from the tomb; but when they entered, they did not find the body of the Lord Jesus. While they were puzzling over this, behold, two men in dazzling garments appeared to them. They were terrified and bowed their faces to the ground. They said to them, 'Why do you seek the living one among the dead? He is not here, but he has been raised.'

quotes.author: St. John Chrysostom
quotes.text: Christ is risen, and life reigns.

quotes.author: Pope Benedict XVI
quotes.text: The Resurrection is real.

quotes.author: St. Paul (1 Corinthians 15:54)
quotes.text: Death has been swallowed up in victory.

quotes.author: St. Augustine
quotes.text: We are an Easter people.

quotes.author: Pope Francis
quotes.text: Hope is born from the empty tomb.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: The Resurrection is the foundation of our faith.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: Christ triumphed over death.

quotes.author: Pope Pius X
quotes.text: Hope rests on the risen Christ.

scripture.text: So then the Lord Jesus, after he spoke to them, was taken up into heaven and took his seat at the right hand of God.

quotes.author: St. Leo the Great
quotes.text: Christ ascended so we may follow.

quotes.author: St. Augustine
quotes.text: Where the Head has gone, the body will follow.

quotes.author: Pope Benedict XVI
quotes.text: He opens heaven to us.

quotes.author: St. John Damascene
quotes.text: He raised our nature.

quotes.author: St. Gregory the Great
quotes.text: He withdraws in body, but remains in divinity.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: Christ ascends to prepare a place for us.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: He opens the gates of heaven.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XI
quotes.text: Our destiny is in heaven with Christ.

mysteries.name: The Descent of the Holy Spirit

scripture.text: When the time for Pentecost was fulfilled, they were all in one place together. And suddenly there came from the sky a noise like a strong driving wind, and it filled the entire house in which they were. Then there appeared to them tongues as of fire, which parted and came to rest on each one of them. And they were all filled with the holy Spirit and began to speak in different tongues, as the Spirit enabled them to proclaim.

quotes.author: St. Basil the Great
quotes.text: Through the Spirit we return to paradise.

quotes.author: Pope Francis
quotes.text: The Spirit brings unity.

quotes.author: St. Cyril of Jerusalem
quotes.text: The Spirit comes gently.

quotes.author: Pope St. John Paul II
quotes.text: The Spirit renews the earth.

quotes.author: St. Seraphim of Sarov
quotes.text: Acquire the Spirit of peace.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: The Holy Spirit is the soul of the Church.

quotes.author: Pope Pius X
quotes.text: The Spirit sanctifies the faithful.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: Pentecost gives birth to the Church.

scripture.text: Behold, from now on will all ages call me blessed. The Mighty One has done great things for me, and holy is his name.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: Mary was assumed body and soul into heaven.

quotes.author: St. John Damascene
quotes.text: She is taken to heavenly dwellings.

quotes.author: St. Germanus of Constantinople
quotes.text: She lives eternally with God.

quotes.author: Pope St. John Paul II
quotes.text: Mary shares in Christ's victory.

quotes.author: St. Alphonsus Liguori
quotes.text: Where Mary is, there is heaven.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: Mary was taken up body and soul into heavenly glory.

quotes.author: Pope Pius X
quotes.text: Mary shares fully in her Son's triumph.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: Mary reigns in heaven with Christ.

scripture.text: A great sign appeared in the sky, a woman clothed with the sun, with the moon under her feet, and on her head a crown of twelve stars.

quotes.author: St. Louis de Montfort
quotes.text: Mary is Queen of all hearts.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: She is Queen of heaven and earth.

quotes.author: St. Bernard of Clairvaux
quotes.text: Let us go to Jesus through Mary.

quotes.author: St. Maximilian Kolbe
quotes.text: Never be afraid of loving Mary too much.

quotes.author: Pope St. John Paul II
quotes.text: Totus Tuus.

quotes.author: Pope Leo XIII
quotes.text: She is our powerful advocate.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XI
quotes.text: Through Mary we come to Christ the King.

quotes.author: Pope Pius XII
quotes.text: Mary is Queen of heaven and earth.

paintings.title: Coronation of the Virgin (Pala degli Oddi)
